General.Name: Fountain Set Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Fountain Set (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, produces and sells knitted fabrics and garments in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, Taiwan, Korea, Sri Lanka, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company involved in fabric knitting, dyeing, printing, finishing, and garment manufacturing activities. It also engages in trading of yarns, dyestuffs, dyed fabrics, chemicals, and garments; and heating supply activities. Fountain Set (Holdings) Limited was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Eastern Sea Industrial Building, Kwai Chung, Hong Kong
